use_codes.desc: USE, IN COMBINATION WITH LOW-DOSE CYTARABINE, FOR THE TREATMENT OF NEWLY-DIAGNOSED ACUTE MYELOID LEUKEMIA (AML) IN ADULT PATIENTS WHO ARE >= 75 YEARS OLD OR WHO HAVE COMORBIDITIES THAT PRECLUDE USE OF INTENSIVE INDUCTION CHEMOTHERAPY
